one_time_description: Impairment loss recognized on investment in Yarmouth Bar Fisheries due to reduction in underlying asset value
economic_notes: First Nation operates Glooscap Corner (convenience store, gaming, gas bar), Glooscap Landing #1 (fuel gas bar and Sweetgrass convenience store), Commercial Fisheries (three lobster fishing boats), Feta Cheese (ceased operations), Economic Development Corporation. Business enterprises include Landing #2, Glooscap Energy #1, Glooscap Energy #2, Seakist Lobster, Yarmouth Bar Fisheries. Purchased remaining minority shares of Yarmouth Bar for $600,000 in May 2023 (now 100% owned). KDSK Holdings, Seakist Lobster, and Yarmouth Bar amalgamated April 1, 2024. Additions to Reserve approved for three parcels of land owned by Landing #1.
notes: Net financial assets is negative (net debt) at -$17,300,181. Loss from business enterprises of $350,896 recorded via modified equity method. Impairment of $474,580 on Yarmouth Bar investment. $600,000 acquisition of minority shares in Yarmouth Bar during year. Intangible assets (fishing licenses) of $2,200,000 acquired during year. Outstanding grant payable to ISC of $794,046 and ACOA demand loan (matured January 2020) of ~$907,074 remain unpaid. OSR calculated as total revenue $11,455,300 minus total government transfers $4,126,821 = $7,328,479 (includes business revenues from Corner, Commercial Fisheries, rent, management fees, and other). Housing expenses include Band Housing ($189,902) and CMHC Housing ($192,563) segments. Salaries total from expenses by object: salaries and wages $3,451,578 plus employee benefits $201,212 = $3,652,790. No schedule of remuneration provided. Restricted cash includes CMHC Replacement Reserve $118,088 and FNFA Debt Reserve Fund $1,098,133.
